name: Test databao build with MySQL
description: Initialize a project with MySQL and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.
descriptionHtml: Initialize a project with MySQL and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.

testStage.description: Initialize a project with MySQL and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.

steps.name: Answering prompt ''What type of datasource do you want to add\?'' with ''mysql''

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.value: 'What type of datasource do you want to add\?'

steps.name: Answering prompt ''Do you want to check the connection to this new datasource\? \[y/N\]:'' with ''y''

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.value: 'Do you want to check the connection to this new datasource\? \[y/N\]:'

parameters.name: database
parameters.value: MysqlDB(datasource_name='test_mysql_conn', datasource_type='mysql', host='localhost', port=32769, database='test', user='test', password='test', check_connection=True, check_connection_succeed=True)
